name: Support payment failure policy example
answer:
Customers can retry a declined card from the billing settings page.
A payment failure automatically retries until the charge succeeds.
Support can update a customer's card without verification.

sources.title: Support Payment Failure Policy
sources.content:
Customers can retry a declined card from the billing settings page.
Payment failures receive one retry after 24 hours; further retries require customer action.
Card changes require account verification.
